name: ox
description: Team context, session recording, and AI coworker coordination for collaborative development

hooks.command: if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then ox agent prime 2>&1 || true; else echo 'SageOx ox CLI is not installed. Visit https://sageox.ai/install to set up.'; fi
